description: A Russian landscape painting depicting a spring thaw scene. Snow is melting, revealing muddy ground and standing water. Bare trees with bird nests stand near a wooden fence and a rustic farmhouse in the background. The sky is pale and misty, suggesting the transition from winter to spring. Crows or rooks perch in the treetops near their nests. The palette is subdued with browns, whites, and pale blues. The scene captures the quiet beauty of the Russian countryside awakening from winter, characteristic of Aleksey Savrasov's lyrical realism.
